title: Sales Account Executive
raw_jd_starter: We are hiring a Sales Account Executive to manage a qualified pipeline, run discovery, build value-based proposals, and close new business. The role partners with customer success, marketing, and product teams to understand buyer needs, maintain accurate CRM records, and forecast revenue. Strong candidates can qualify opportunities, handle objections, negotiate commercially sound agreements, and communicate clearly with buyers and internal stakeholders.
suggested_knockout_areas: Cannot describe a structured sales process
suggested_fixed_interview_questions: Walk through a recent deal from discovery to close. What did you qualify, and what changed your approach?
How do you decide whether an opportunity should stay in the forecast?
Describe a time you handled a pricing or procurement objection.

title: Customer Support Specialist
raw_jd_starter: We are hiring a Customer Support Specialist to resolve customer issues through chat and email, document recurring problems, and work with product and engineering teams on escalations. The role requires clear writing, calm prioritization, accurate troubleshooting, and strong ownership of follow-up. Strong candidates can explain technical steps in plain language and maintain service quality under queue pressure.
suggested_fixed_interview_questions: Tell us about a complex support case you resolved. How did you isolate the cause?
How do you prioritize a queue when several customers are waiting?
Share an example of turning a frustrated customer interaction around.

title: Operations Manager
raw_jd_starter: We are hiring an Operations Manager to improve day-to-day delivery, track operating metrics, coordinate cross-functional work, and remove process bottlenecks. The role owns operating cadences, vendor or internal stakeholder follow-up, and root-cause analysis for recurring misses. Strong candidates can turn ambiguous operating problems into measurable processes and practical changes.
suggested_fixed_interview_questions: Describe an operational process you improved. What changed in the metrics?
How do you run follow-up when several teams own different parts of the work?
Tell us about a recurring miss you investigated and fixed.

title: HR Generalist
raw_jd_starter: We are hiring an HR Generalist to support employee relations, onboarding, policy operations, HR systems, and manager guidance. The role requires careful documentation, discretion, process consistency, and clear escalation judgment. Strong candidates can balance employee experience with policy requirements and maintain accurate records.
suggested_knockout_areas: No evidence of structured HR operations
suggested_fixed_interview_questions: Describe a sensitive workplace issue you supported. How did you document and escalate it?
How do you help managers apply policy consistently?
Tell us about an onboarding or HR process you improved.

title: Marketing Specialist
raw_jd_starter: We are hiring a Marketing Specialist to plan campaigns, create clear content briefs, coordinate launches, measure performance, and improve messaging through data. The role works with sales, design, and product teams to execute campaigns across email, web, and social channels. Strong candidates can connect audience insight, execution quality, and measurable campaign results.
suggested_knockout_areas: Cannot explain audience or channel choices
suggested_fixed_interview_questions: Walk through a campaign you supported. What was the audience, channel plan, and result?
How do you decide whether campaign messaging is working?
Describe a launch with multiple stakeholders and how you kept it on track.

title: Finance Analyst
raw_jd_starter: We are hiring a Finance Analyst to build reports, analyze budget-to-actual variance, support forecasting, and communicate financial insights to business partners. The role requires spreadsheet rigor, data validation, clear assumptions, and concise explanation of drivers. Strong candidates can identify anomalies, trace source data, and explain tradeoffs.
suggested_knockout_areas: No evidence of clear financial communication
suggested_fixed_interview_questions: Tell us about a financial analysis you built. What assumptions mattered most?
How do you validate source data before sharing a report?
Describe a time you explained a variance or forecast change to a non-finance partner.

title: Backend Engineer
raw_jd_starter: We are hiring a Backend Engineer to design and operate APIs, data models, background jobs, and service integrations. The role requires production debugging, testing discipline, observability, and collaboration with product and frontend partners. Strong candidates can explain technical tradeoffs, ship maintainable services, and diagnose reliability issues.
suggested_knockout_areas: Poor API or data modeling reasoning
suggested_fixed_interview_questions: Walk through a backend system you designed. What tradeoffs did you make?
Describe a production issue you debugged and how you prevented recurrence.
How do you decide what to test in a service change?
